reviews.comment:
Empleados poco comunicativo y si el surtidor no queda de su lado te hacen volver a la otra cola! Raro!!!

(Translated by Google)
The staff are uncommunicative, and if the pump isn't on their side, they make you go back to the other line! Weird!
